nasb.text: And he who falls on this stone will be broken to pieces; but on whomever it falls, it will scatter him like dust.”

esv.text: And the one who falls on this stone will be broken to pieces; and when it falls on anyone, it will crush him.”

cnv.text: 誰跌在這石頭上，就必摔碎；這石頭掉在誰的身上，就必把他壓得粉碎。”

ccb.text: 凡跌在这石头上的人，一定粉身碎骨；这石头落在谁身上，就会把谁砸烂。”

csbs.text: 那跌落在这石头上的人，就将被破碎；这石头落在谁的身上，就会把谁砸得稀烂。”
